name: @intelligent-farming/chirpstack-join-aggregator
description: Deduplicate a stream of LoRaWAN join requests by DevEUI and surface aggregated state — first/last-seen timestamps, retry count, observing gateways — so an onboarding UI can render one row per device instead of a flood per retry. Subscribes to chirpstack-join-watcher (or any structural equivalent) and emits change events.
